PDFPrivado Web - third-party notices for the local QPDF WebAssembly engine

Bundled package
---------------
@neslinesli93/qpdf-wasm 0.3.0
Package declaration: ISC
https://www.npmjs.com/package/@neslinesli93/qpdf-wasm

Underlying engine
-----------------
QPDF 12.2.0
Copyright (c) 2005-2025 Jay Berkenbilt and QPDF contributors
License: Apache License 2.0
https://github.com/qpdf/qpdf

Build dependencies included by the WebAssembly distribution
-------------------------------------------------------------
zlib — zlib License
libjpeg-turbo — BSD-style and other compatible licenses detailed in its copyright file

The complete QPDF Apache 2.0 license and the distribution copyright notices for
zlib and libjpeg-turbo are included in the licenses directory beside this file.
The package README and package.json are also included for attribution and version
traceability. No file is loaded from a CDN at runtime.
